program.name: Pulse of Punjab · ਸਭ ਦੀ ਸੁਣਾਂਗੇ
program.tagline: ਸਭ ਦੀ ਸੁਣਾਂਗੇ · Sab di sunenge - Constituency-wise listening + mobilization. Punjabiyat Di Lehar. Har Pind. Har Shehar.

priorities.name: Frontline Engagement
priorities.goal: Pick up every interaction - chat, comment, DM - on the page and respond.

listeningScope.desc: All-Punjab listening across platforms, bucketed by constituency.

priorities.name: Cadre Mobilization
priorities.goal: Activate and organize the party cadre - booth-level workers, volunteers and frontline karyakartas - into a mapped, deployable ground force.

priorities.name: Voter Conversion
priorities.goal: Final month - move engaged supporters to confirmed voters.

timeline.label: Stand up listening tool, baseline interactions
Cadre onboarding - booth workers & volunteers mapped
Booth mapping + knowledge base seeded, events engine
Voter conversion push - full user journey

engagement.trigger: Voter touchpoint (QR poster, page, event, door-to-door)

features.label: Volunteer
features.desc: Sign up to help in your area

features.label: Location-wise
features.desc: See what's near you by PIN

knowledgeBase.purpose: Right data for vote conversion. Structured so every interaction enriches a voter profile.

grievancePipeline.description: Raise a grievance at your convenience -> schedule a call -> resolve.

stages.label: Raised
stages.desc: Voter submits via scan / chat / comment

stages.label: Call Scheduled
stages.desc: Voter picks a free time slot
